articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 수모로직, 엔터프라이즈 애플리케이션과 클로드 통합 관리
articles.description: 클로드 컴플라이언스 API 선보여지능형 플랫폼 통해 보안 및 운영 데이터 통합[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 수모로직(Sumo Logic)은 ISEC 2026에서 새롭게 출시된 클로드 컴플라이언스 API(Claude Compliance API)를 포함한 AI 기능 및 활용 사례를 선보일 예정이다.수모로직은 지능형 플랫폼을 통해 핵심 보안 및 운영 데이터를 통합함으
articles.summary: 수모로직이는 ISEC 2026에서 새로운 클로드 컴플라이언스 API를 제공하고 AI 기능을 활용할 수 있는 선보이를 제출
points: 수모로직이는 ISEC 2026에서 새로운 클로드 컴플라이언스 API를 제공한다.
AI 기능을 활용하여 보안 및 운영 데이터 통합
관리적인 자동화 방식을 통해 응답 시간을 단축시키기 위한 선보이
articles.insight: 수모로직이의 이러한 특징은 IT/기술 업계에서의 보안 개정으로 연결되어 있다.

articles.title: [배종찬의 보안 빅데이터] 앤트로픽 ‘미토스’, 신의 선물인가 저주인가
articles.description: 미국의 미토스 통제, AI 기술이 국가 안보의 최전선에 배치되었음을 보여주는 사례AI, 동맹국과의 연대를 공고히 하고 자국의 국방력을 증강하는 전략적 수단으로 자리 잡아[보안뉴스= 배종찬 인사이트케이 연구소장] 인공지능(AI)이 인류의 비즈니스 파트너를 넘어 국가의 생존을 좌우하는 ‘사이버 핵폭탄’이자 핵심 전략자산으로 변모하고 있다. 최근 앤트로픽(Ant
articles.summary: 미국의 미토스 통제에 AI가 기여한 사건과, 대량의 보안 데이dependent on personal interpretation and may not accurately reflect the news content.
points: AI를 활용한 미국의 미토스 잡음
신한 금융은 이에 대해 공고하고 제왕을 강화하며, 인공지능(AI)는 국가의 안전구장과 비즈니지 경로를 확보
이러한 AI 기술이 우리나라의 수요일 대전으로서 기선을 강화하고, 국방력 연산과정에서 인공지능의 중요성을 강조
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 AI가 수시간 전염바ffects의 대역할이나, 국방력 곤제와 인공지능이 연결되어 보안을 향상시켜야 하는 현재의 정보보호질의가 강조된다.

articles.title: US cybersecurity agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
articles.description: Independent cybersecurity journalist Brian Krebs reported in May that a security researcher with cyber firm GitGuardian alerted him to reams of exposed passwords stored in a publicly accessible GitHub repository, which an employee of a CISA contractor had uploaded.
articles.summary: An independent cybersecurity journalist reported on leaked sensitive data from a GitGuardian-monitored public GitHub repository belonging to an employee of the US CISA contractor.
points: GitHub hosted passwords exposed by a security researcher
Data belonged to the United States cybersecurity agency' extraneous exposure
Issue highlights need for better data handling practices
articles.insight: This incident underscores the importance of strict access controls and regular audits within organizations, especially when dealing with sensitive information like passwords.

articles.title: Phia accused of ‘cookie stuffing,’ taking affiliate credit on purchases it didn’t earn
articles.description: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation.
articles.summary: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
articles.description: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."
articles.summary: Meta announced on Thursday evening they will remove a controversial AI tool from Instagram after receiving significant backlash for potentially misused features.
points: The AI feature allowed users to superimpose faces onto existing images and videos, which raised privacy concerns among the public.
Meta received substantial negative feedback regarding how this could lead to unauthorized use of personal likenesses in user-generated content without consent.
Despite initial testing showing interest from creators for such a feature within controlled environments like fan art or parodies, it failed the broader community's approval.
articles.insight: The swift removal of Meta’s AI tool reflects growing user concerns over privacy and consent in digital content generation. This incident is prompting companies to reconsider their approach towards emerging technologies like generative models that can blur ethical lines within social media.

articles.title: Bluesky’s interim CEO, Toni Schneider, drops the ‘interim’
articles.description: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.
articles.summary: Toni Schneider has stepped down as interim CEO of Bluesky to focus full-time on its growth and development.
points: Schneider is an experienced technology leader with a successful track record at Automattic and True Ventures.
Bluesky, the unconventional social media platform founded by Schneider in collaboration with Alexis Cohen.
As full-time CEO of Bluesky, Schneider plans to shift focus towards user experience improvements, community building efforts, product enhancements.
articles.insight: With a seasoned leader like Toni Schneider at the helm as permanent CEO, we can expect significant growth and innovation in this unconventional social media platform industry. His dedication to Bluesky indicates that he sees it as an alternative or competitive option within the technology landscape.

articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
articles.description: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.
articles.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI for what it claims is trade secret theft involving its technology and methodologies.
points: Senior Apple leadership directed misconthinking at competitors, leading to a lawsuit against OpenAI.
The allegation centers on potential use of proprietary information by former Apple employee now working with OpenAI.
OpenAI denies the claims and asserts its technology is independently developed.
articles.insight: This incident highlights growing tensions in AI development around intellectual property rights, raising questions about open collaboration versus competitive advantage within the industry.

articles.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
articles.description: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.
articles.summary: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry

articles.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
articles.description: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.
articles.summary: SK Hynix's $26.5B IPO marks the largest foreign listing in US history amidst an AI chip boom, leading to calls for it and Samsung to establish new U.clficated factories.
points: The AI chip industry witnessed a historic moment with SK Hynix's record-breaking IPO of $26.5B on Wall Street.
articles.insight: This event may prompt increased competition for the limited semiconductor manufacturing capacity, particularly in advanced fabs essential to maintaining AI chip production momentum and addressing global shortages.

articles.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
articles.description: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.
articles.summary: HyperTexting is an app designed to replicate the social media experience on websites and blogs by allowing content from these platforms to be viewed as a scrollable feed.
points: The HyperTexting app converts various online sources into a single, easy-to-navigate scrolling interface similar to traditional social media feeds.
It simplifies the process of posting updates directly onto one's own website or blog from within its user interface.
Designed with an intuitive touch and swipe navigation for mobile users.
articles.insight: HyperTexting is poised to enhance content discoverability on traditional websites, potentially driving more traffic back into the open web ecosystem rather than keeping it confined within social media platforms.

articles.title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
articles.description: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.
articles.summary: China has successfully completed the recovery of an orbital rocket booster for the first time using a helicopter and ships near Hainan province.
points: China's space company, China National Space Administration (CNSA), conducted its maiden mission to recover an orbital launch vehicle on November 4th at approximately 10 am local Beijing time in the South China Sea.
The recovery was executed by a helicopter and ships near Hainan province after their separation from orbit, with this first attempt being successful as per CNSA reports.
This achievement marks significant progress for Chinese space programs following decades of lag behind Elon Musk'ner SpaceX’s reusable rocket technologies.
articles.insight: China is making notable advancements in its own commercial space industry, and if continued at this pace, the country could close significant technology gaps between itself and leading private entities like SpaceX within a few years. This development has implications for global competitive dynamics in both governmental and industrial sectors.

articles.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
articles.description: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.
articles.summary: Disney is contemplating introducing a free streaming tier to its Disney+ service in order to compete with popular free video platforms.
points: The potential introduction of a free tier could allow Disney+ to combat the growing consumer shift towards unlimited, no-cost online content consumption habits seen on competitors like YouTube and Tubi.

This move is being considered as part of an expansion strategy that includes adding new shows with global appeal such as 'The Mandalorian' within its existing subscription model before considering free access to all users.
Disney aims for this shift towards providing freer content in some form, although it remains uncertain if Disney+ will ever completely abandon paid subscriptions.
articles.insight: This news indicates that major streaming services like Disney are reevaluating their pricing models and exploring options to provide more free or affordable content as consumer behaviors evolve towards expecting cheaper access, which may affect the overall profitability of subscription-based video on demand (VOD) platforms.

articles.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone
articles.description: Dumb Co sells flip phones that sync to your smartphone, bridging the infinite connectivity of the iPhone and the unrealistic limitations of an early 2000s relic.
articles.summary: Dumb Co offers a unique way to enjoy smartphones with added nostalgia by syncing flip phones that have modern capabilities.
points: Dumb Co's product is marketed as 'unhackable', yet they sell flip phones modified for Bluetooth connectivity and synchronization with contemporary devices like iPhones.
The article raises concerns about the integrity of Dumb Co, questioning whether their products are truly safe from hackers who might exploit older technology vulnerabilities.
Despite these concerns, there is a portion of consumers drawn to retro-style tech and seem willing to take risks for style over security.
articles.insight: This news could indicate an increasing trend in the blending of old-school design with modern technology demands. However, it also highlights significant concerns regarding cybersecurity awareness among consumers attracted by nostalgia or unique product offerings within IT/technology.

articles.title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits
articles.description: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.
articles.summary: Oratomic is raising $300M to create a scalable quantum computer with significantly fewer qubits than competitors aim for.
points: Oratomic has raised an impressive $30 endowment from notable investors, setting high goals of scaling down the number of essential qubits needed and making it viable at scale without compromising on power or reliability due to noise interference.

The company is focusing primarily on building a quantum computer capable with 20K usable bits as opposed to billions required by leading companies like IonQ, Quantinure, Rigetti and IBM. This strategic approach reduces the complexity of fabrication while also minimizing error rate due to lesser noise.
The company's unique architecture could potentially reduce development costs significantly for quantum computers making it more accessible in mainstream computing markets.
articles.insight: Oratomic is challenging conventional methods by reducing qubits needed, lowering the barriers to entry into the quantum computing market and paving way towards practical applications of this advanced technology. It'deciphers a new potential direction for other companies aiming at making quantum computing more mainstream.

articles.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels
articles.description: Amid signs of slowing engagement, Netflix is reportedly considering launching "always-on" live channels, giving subscribers something to tune into 24/7.
articles.summary: Netflix may introduce 'always-on' live TV channels as part of its strategy amidst slowing viewer engagement.
points: Signs of Netflix subscriber disengagement prompt exploration into new content strategies, including always-on channels to maintain user interest and subscription rates.
Always-on live TV proposals suggest a potential shift in Netflix' endgame product offering towards more conventional broadcast services despite its established streaming service model.
The move could indicate increasing competition from traditional television providers as well as the rise of new direct competitors like Disney+, which also offer always-on linear channels.
articles.insight: Netflix's consideration to launch 'always-on' live TV signals its attempt to diversify content delivery and potentially respond to evolving viewer preferences. This could impact the streaming market by introducing a new hybrid model that combines both traditional linear broadcast elements with personalized Netflix algorithms.

articles.title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram
articles.description: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said.
articles.summary: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
articles.description: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group to extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.
articles.summary: Yuriy Baranovsky, known as Yunoyama from hacker forums in Japan and Russia, was convicted of aiding DarkSide ransomware group to extort companies by negotiating payments.
points: Third individual prosecuted: Yuriy Baranovsky (Yunoyama), involved with the notorious criminal hacking collective known as 'DarkSide.'
Jailed in New York State for one year after pleading guilty to charges of conspiracy and money laundering.
Baranovsky's conviction highlights that even negotiators within cybercriminal networks are vulnerable to prosecution.
articles.insight: The case underlines the increasing willingness of law enforcement agencies, like FBI and Interpol, to target all levels involved in ransomware attacks. This could lead to more arrests at this level as authorities continue their efforts against cybercrime.

articles.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
articles.description: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]
articles.summary: Clem Delangue, CEO of Hugging Face, discusses why many organizations are moving away from renting AI to using open-source solutions instead.
points: Hugging Face has grown into a hub for sharing and downloading open models and datasets in the AI field.
Around half of Fortune 5 end users now rely on Hugging Face' extramural content, according to Delangue.
Companies increasingly develop their own bespoke solutions instead of renting or using external services.
articles.insight: The growth and preference for open-source AI could signify a trend towards customization and control in enterprise technology, potentially reshaping the market dynamics around AI as a service (AIaaS).

articles.title: [2026 개인정보보호 우수사례-4] 한수원, 개인정보 보호수준 평가 100점 만점... 1442개 기관 중 전체 1위
articles.description: 임원급 경영부사장 CPO 지정... 전담 조직 신설 및 전사적 예산 집중 투자AI 기반 이상행위 탐지·개인정보 자동 파기 시스템 구축해 내부통제 강화[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 한국수력원자력이 ‘2025년 공공기관 개인정보 보호수준 평가’에서 만점인 100점을 획득하며 전체 1442개 대상 기관 중 1위를 차지했다. 임원급인 경영부사장을 개인정보보호책임자(CP
articles.summary: 한국수력원자력은 2025년 공공기관의 개인정보 보호 수준에서 100점을 획득하고, 전체 1442개 기관중 1위를 차지했다.
points: 한국수력원자력이 '2025년 공공기관 개인정보 보호 수준' 평가에서 100점을 얻음
- 전체 1442개 대상 기광중, 한국수력원자력이 1위를 차지한다.
- AI 기반 방식을 사용하여 개인정보 탐지·자동 업데이트를 강화
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업체에서 개인정보보호에 대한 중요성과 현재의 국내 조선련방식이며, 공정한 분양을 위해 핵심으로 AI 기술이 사용되고 있음을 강조한다.

articles.title: 한-베트남 개인정보보호 협력을 위한 전문가 교류·협력 세미나 개최
articles.description: 응우옌 홍 꾸언 베트남 개인정보보호위윈회 방한에 맞춰 개인정보 보호전문가 모여베트남, 한국 개인정보보호법 등 참고해 2026년 1월 개인정보보호법 제정[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 한국과 ICT 및 디지털 분야에서 긴밀한 파트너십을 맺고 있는 베트남은 사이버보안, 특히 개인정보보호 분야와도 밀접한 관계를 보여주고 있다. 무엇보다 베트남은 2026년 1월 1일자로
articles.summary: 게시한 기사는 베트남과 한국의 개인정보보호약접근을 강조하여 IT/기술 협상에 대해서 직찬한 세미나 개최에 대한 설명.
points: 베트남과 한국은 개인정보보호약접근을 강조하여 IT/기술 협상에 대해 공유한 세미나 개최
이러한 마사지는 2026년 1월 1일자로 개정되어야 한다.
개인정보보호 관련 서비스가 국가에서 중요하고 활립한 역할을 수행하고 있음
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 협상에서 개인정보보호에 대해 중요한 논의에 대한 참조를 제공하고, 베트남과 한국의 공동으로써 이를 다수의 국가와 기업들에게 중요한 협상을 보여준다.

articles.title: 펜타시큐리티, 국제 심포지엄서 ‘산업 선도기업상’ 수상

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 써트코리아, 디지서트의 ‘지능형 신뢰(Intelligent Trust)’ 플랫폼 DigiCert
articles.description: 인증서 유효기간 단축과 양자컴퓨터·AI 시대의 새로운 보안 과제 해결 지원[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 써트코리아는 파인앤서비스의 인증사업부이자 디지서트(DigiCert) 총판 자격의 공식 파트너로, 20년 이상 국내 인증서 시장을 선도해 온 인증 전문기업이다. 디지서트 ONE 플랫폼을 기반으로 인증서 수명주기 자동화(DigiCert TLM), DNS 보안 서비
articles.summary: 디지스터트(DigiCert)는 인증서의 유효기간 단축과 AI를 이용한 보안을 강화하고, 그리고 20년간 수명주기 자동화된 인증서 시장을 촉진했다.
points: - DigiCert는 AI와 기존 인증서를 대체하여 신속한 인증서 제공을 추진
- 판매약 계정이나 공급원에게 유연한 인증서 시스템을 제공하여 운영 및 사용 시간의 피로틀
- DigiCert는 기존 인증서 시장에서 선수로 되어, 20년간 인증기초를 위한 자동화된 시스템을 제공
articles.insight: DigiCert의 이 브랜드는 IT/기술 업계에서 인증서 보안과 자동화에 대한 핵심적인 시대와 개선을 제공하고, 상위 피로틴의 인증서를 기본값으로 제공.

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 시스코 보안 3종으로 완성하는 제로트러스트... ISEC 2026서 만난다
articles.description: 시스코 공식 총판 아이넷뱅크, Duo·Secure Access·Secure Workload로 통합 보안 전략 제시[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 시스코(Cisco) 공식 총판인 아이넷뱅크(iNETBANK)는 20년 이상의 시스코 공식 총판이며 국내 IT시장과 함께 성장해 온 ICT 유통 전문기업으로, 서울 본사와 대구·대전·부산 지사를 거점으로 2400여개 파트너

points: - 시스코 공식 총판의 iNETBANK 아이너티드로 보안 전략 결정
- 주기적으로 시장에서 성장하고 ICT 영역에서 중요한 변화점을 이해함
- 국내 IT시장과 같은 전문가들로 인용되는 보안 전략을 제공
articles.insight: iNETBANK의 공식 총판이며 시장에서 성장하고 IT 영역에서 중요한 변화점을 인식해 ITC 기술에 대한 보안 전략 제시

articles.title: KISA, 공급망 보안 모델 구축 과제 방향 공유
articles.description: ‘2026년 공급망 보안 인사이트 데이’ 개최[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 한국인터넷진흥원(KISA, 원장 이상중)과 과학기술정보통신부(부총리 겸 장관 배경훈)는 과제 수행 기업들과 공급망 보안 모델 구축 과제 방향과 전략을 공유했다. 두 기관은 ‘2026년 공급망 보안 모델 구축 지원사업’ 참여 기업의 첫 교류 행사인 ‘2026년 공급망 보안 인사이트 데이’를
articles.summary: KISA와 부총리겸이 공급망 보안 모델 구축 방향과 전략을 공유한다.
points: KISA와 부총리겸이 '2026년 공급망 보안 인사이트 데이' 기회를 통해 계효한 공유방향과 전략
공급망 보안에 대한 이해와 지원을 나눌 예정
2026년에 공급망 보안 모델 구축 지원사업을 촉진했다.
articles.insight: 이러한 기술과 전문가의 연동은 IT/기술 업계에서 공급망보안 새로운 기술적인 정신을 만들어내는 도움이다.

articles.title: 비욘드트러스트, 비인간 및 AI ID 권한 관리 위한 ‘NHI 거버넌스’ 출시
articles.description: NHI 수명 주기 전반 관리... 최소 원칙 강제, AI 에이전트 보안 강화[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 비욘드트러스트는 서비스 계정, API 키, 클라우드 워크로드, AI 에이전트 등 비인간 ID(NHI)를 제어하고 관리하는 신규 솔루션 ‘패스파인더 NHI 거버넌스’(Pathfinder NHI Governance)를 출시했다고 9일(현지시간) 밝혔다. 최근 기
articles.summary: 비욘드트러스트는 새로워진 '패스파인더 NHI 거버넌스'를 기반으로 비인간 ID 관리를 자동화시키고 보안을 강화한다.
points: 비욘드트러스트가 '패스파인더 NHI 거버넌스' 코드로 비인간 ID를 관리할 수 s에 새로운 IT 기술 서비스를 제출한다.
AI ID 보안을 강화하고, AI 사용자를 받아오는 방식으로 ID 관리를 이어가고 있습니다.
이 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서의 ID 관리 전반적인 진행과 보안 개선에 대한 이해를 제공한다.
articles.insight: 기사는 IT/기술 업계가 AI 사용자의 ID 관리와 보안을 위한 신속한 방법이 '패스파인더 NHI 거버넌스'로 고도로 제시한다.

articles.title: After Apple, India’s smartphone manufacturing boom enters new phase with Vivo JV
articles.description: Vivo's joint venture could become a template for Chinese smartphone makers in India.
articles.summary: The article discusses the recent announcement of Vivo and Micromax setting up an exclusive manufacturing facility as part of their joint venture (JV) agreement with a focus on producing smartphones for India' end consumers.
points: Chinese brand, Vivo has entered into an exclusive JV in partnership with Indian firm Micromax to set up its first manufacturing plant exclusively dedicated to the production of entry-level devices under their own brands targeting cost sensitive segments within India’s expanding smartphone market.

This facility is expected to be located at a former TCL factory site in Noida, Uttarakhand and will come online as early as January 2019. The plant capacity has been estimated by industry experts between 3 million – 5 million units annually with each brand contributing approximately half of the manufacturing activities.
The investment for this venture is valued at $80-100 Million and will create thousands of direct employment opportunities in India, further strengthening China's presence within its local market.
articles.insight: This joint venture not only helps to meet the burgeoning demand for smartphones among cost sensitive segments but also establishes a strong foundation that Chinese brands can utilize as they expand their footprint in India. It will likely inspire more similar collaborations between Indian and Chinese companies.

articles.title: “AI 무기화, 통합 가시성이 해법... 데이터독, 자율 보안 비전 공유
articles.description: 9일 미디어 라운드테이블 개최딥페이크 피싱·자동화 랜섬웨어 등 고도화된 위협과 에이전트 통제 방안 공유‘옵저버빌리티’ 넘어 스스로 문제 해결하는 자율 운영 생태계 제시[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “국내 생성형 AI 도입 속도는 글로벌 최상위권을 기록하며 산업 전반의 혁신을 주도하고 있습니다. 그러나 기술 발전 속도에 비해 이를 안전하게 통제하고 설명할 수 있는
articles.summary: 국내 AI 도전과제의 운현 시스텬 공유에 대한 IT/기술 뉴스 결과
points: 고위율화된 경영체 등을 이용해 핵심 AI 도전의 공유
안전 시스템화받기 위해 AI로 인식되는 운영체의 제품적인 구성을 소개합니다
해당 모델이 전용도로 일하며, 시스템 안전성에 대한 문제점에 질의받기
articles.insight: 뉴스는 AI 기술의 안전 강화를 위한 이해와 피드백을 제공하며, 세계에서의 AI 운전의 영향을 모조차지로 보여줍니다.

articles.title: DJI, 에베레스트서 드론 활용 새 역사... 물자 운송·매핑·기후 연구 성공

articles.title: 이억원 금융위원장 “AI 보안 갖춘 금융사, 망분리 전면해제 곧 구체화”
articles.description: 금융사 CEO 초청 ‘정보보호의 날 기념 행사’ 참석“AI 보안 체계 구축과 제도 개선 지속할 것”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 이억원 금융위원장이 AI 보안 역량을 갖춘 금융사들에 대해 망분리를 전면 해제하는 방안 마련에 속도를 내겠다고 강조했다. 10일 이억원 금융위원장은 금융회사 CEO 초청 ‘정보보호의 날 기념 행사’에 참석했다.이 위원장은 인사말을 통해
articles.summary: 이억원 금융위원장 강현주는 AI 보안 기술을 확률로 강화한 금저들에서 망을 전면해제하고자 한다.
points: 금융사 CEO 초청 인사 회식 참석
AI 보안 기술의 매우 중요성을 강조
금융사들에서 AI로 보안를 개선하여 마련해제
articles.insight: 이억원 금융위원장은 IT/기술 업계가 이미 망의 일부를 지우고자 한다. AI로 보안을 개선하여 새로운 IT/기술 활동을 위해서는 전체적인 긍정치연성이 필요한 볼일이다.

articles.title: 대만, 중국 사이버 스파이 활동 도운 자국 사업가 2명 기소
articles.description: 현지인 명의 라인(LINE) 계정 수집, 중국 연계 해킹 그룹에 제공외신 기자 사칭해 정치인·언론인 겨냥 맞춤형 악성코드 유포[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 대만 사법 당국이 정치인, 언론인, 학계 등을 표적으로 광범위한 스파이 공작을 벌인 중국 정부 연계 해커들을 도운 현지 기업인 2명을 기소했다. 대만 법무부 조사국(MJIB)에 따르면, 이들은 대만 모바일 번

articles.title: 제2회 항공보안 논문공모전 시상식 개최
articles.description: 항공보안 정책·AI 연구 등 우수논문 18편 선정[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] ‘제2회 항공보안 논문공모전’ 시상식이 7월 9일 인천국제공항 제1여객터미널 인천공항경찰단 회의실에서 열렸다. 이번 공모전은 한국항공보안학회와 관계기관이 공동으로 추진한 행사로, 항공보안·안전 분야의 학술연구 활성화와 제도 개선을 목표로 마련된 것이다. 지난해에 이어 두 번째로 개최된
articles.summary: 제2회 항공보안 논문공모전이 초진한 시상식에서 한국 항공보안학회와 관련된 계층이 연구울성과 제도 개선을 중심으로 하는 기사 내용입니다.
points: 이어 공모전은 항공보안·안전 분약의 학술연구 활성화와 제도 개선을 목표로 하는 것입니다.
2021년에 마사지를 시작하기 전공회의소와 항공보안·안전 분약에 대한 연구 자료를 18편 선정하여 개최합니다.
인천국제공항과 관련된 위치로 시상식을 열었습니다.
articles.insight: 이 공모전은 한국 항공보안학회와 관련된 기사 내용에서 잘못된 결론을 도출해 주지 마세요.

articles.title: 신라대, 공항 수준 실습시설 갖춘 보안검색교육센터 문 열어
articles.description: 부산보안검색교육센터 개소... 동남권 보안검색 전문인력 양성 본격화국토부 지정 교육기관으로 8월부터 현장 중심 교육 운영[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 신라대학교(총장 허남식)는 8일 교내 부산보안검색교육센터 개소식을 개최하고, 항공을 비롯한 국가 중요시설 보안 분야 전문인력 양성을 위한 교육을 오는 8월부터 본격 운영한다고 밝혔다.부산보안검색교육센터는 국토교통부
articles.summary: 신라대학교가 8월에 개소식을 개최하여, 항공시섹터의 보안검색 교육을 본격화하고자한다.
points: - 신라대학교는 국토교통부에서 개원함
- 보안검색 교육을 현장으로서 제공
- 기술과 전자화되어 진정한 보안업계와의 성공
articles.insight: 이러한 교육 기반으로 출동자들은 IT/기술 업체에서의 보안 직업에 대해 더욱나다가지고 가야한다.

articles.title: 한국항공보안학회, 대테러·대드론 전문가 토론회 개최
articles.description: 보이지 않는 새로운 위협, 신종 드론테러 예방과 국가적 대응전략 시급드론테러 예방을 위한 무력화가 조속히 마련돼야[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 인천국제공항경찰단과 한국항공보안학회는 7월 9일 인천국제공항공사 항공교육원에서 ‘긴급진단 - 대테러·대드론 전문가토론회’를 열었다. 이는 지난 6월 쿠웨이트 국제공항이 드론 공격을 받아 다수의 인명 피해가 발생한 사건을

articles.title: AI 코딩 어시스턴트 `환각` 노린 신종 ‘할루스쿼팅’(`HalluSquatting) 공격 경고
articles.description: AI 환각 패턴 선점해 간접 프롬프트 주입 유도기존 방화벽 무력화하는 신종 에이전트 권한 장악 기법 경고[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] AI 코딩 어시스턴트의 고질적 ‘환각’(Hallucination) 현상을 악용해 봇넷(Botnet) 악성코드를 유포하고 사용자 시스템을 장악할 수 있는 신종 공격 기법, ‘할루스쿼팅’(HalluSquatting)이 공개됐다.AI

articles.title: [카드뉴스] “유출 자격증명 2,700만건 차단” 유로폴·MS 합작 ‘오퍼레이션 엔드게임’ 악성코드 공장 소탕 전말
articles.description: 전 세계 유관 사법 기관과 마이크로소프트가 협력한 역대급 합동 타격 작전 ‘오퍼레이션 엔드게임’을 통해 사이버 범죄의 핵심 중추인 봇넷 인프라가 대거 소탕되었다. 이번 작전은 무려 2,700만 건의 유출 자격 증명을 기반으로 정보 탈취 조립 라인을 가동하며 랜섬웨어 유포의 방아쇠 역할을 하던 ‘속골리쉬’와 ‘아마데이’ 전송망을 타겟으로 삼았다. 개별 악성코
articles.summary: 한국어로 요약을 수동입니다.
points: 유출 자격 증명을 이용하여 사이버 범죄처를 통해 전역 인터넷 공학을 진행
‘속골리쉬’와 ‘아마데이’는 다음과 같은 연결적인 논쟁을 위해 사용
봇넷의 공식 수호기기에 대한 국가적인 문제점이 시나리오
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 각 국가의 IT/기술 정치에서 중요한 이러한 논쟁이 일어나고 있음을 알리며, 인터넷 공학에서 사용할 수 0으로 결정이 되는 요인이 다음과 같은 중요한 것을 강조함

articles.title: 안랩, 산업통상부 장관 표창... “전략물자 통제시스템 수출경쟁력 기여”
articles.description: 1000만불 수출탑 장관상 이은 수상[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 글로벌 통합 보안 기업 안랩(대표 강석균)은 9일 서울시 중구 대한상공회의소에서 열린 ‘2026 무역안보의 날 기념식’에서 전략물자 수출관리 단체부문 유공자 포상을 수상했다고 10일 밝혔다.산업통상부와 무역안보관리원은 매년 무역안보의 날 기념식에서 전략물자의 안정적 관리와 수출관리 제도 이행 확산
articles.summary: 안랩의 기업이 관련된 IT/기술 업계에서 전략물의 수출시스템에 기여한 영향을 밝혔다.
points: 대한가이스는 IT/기술 업체 규모에 비율이 높은 전략물 수출시스템을 개선하고, 정성적인 서비스를 제공
국가가 IT/기술 산업에서 중요한 역사와 문화적인 기록을 관리하고, 전략물의 수출시스템이 국민과 유대민자와 인내운서에 유도되는 본가
국가가 IT/기술 산업을 지구중심에서 다수의 국제로까지 기록하고, 전략물의 수출시스템이 전세관리 역량과 사회적 인식을 높이며, 국가가 국민의 보상을 강조
articles.insight: 안랩의 IT/기술 업체는 전략물의 수출시스템에 기여하고, 국가의 중요성과 귀하의 채용이 국가의 보상과 인내운서의 자유를 강조한다.

articles.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
articles.description: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.
articles.summary: Microsoft has announced that its Copilot tool for businesses uses OpenAI’s GPT technology as the core model despite ongoing speculation about a company breakup.
points: Copilot continues to use AI from OpenAI, specifically version 5.6 of their models
Microsoft has been rumored to split into two entities: one for hardware and another focused on cloud services like Azure's Copilot tool
The integration with Microsoft’s other workplace tools remains undisclosed
articles.insight: Despite speculation about a company breakup, the continuation of using OpenAI models in their AI applications demonstrates that collaboration between tech giants may be here to stay.

articles.title: Don’t want to invest in Elon Musk? Two new ETFs explicitly exclude him
articles.description: The new exchanged-traded funds exclude companies that are founded, controlled, or led by Elon Musk. That means no SpaceX or Tesla.
articles.summary: Two newly launched ETFs specifically avoid investing in any company associated with billionaire entrepreneur Elon Musk.
points: The Two New Ex-Tesla/SpaceX Funds
Focus on companies without ties to disruptive innovators like SpaceX and Tesla CEO Elon Musk.
These funds signal investors' concerns about the influence of high-profile tech leaders.
articles.insight: The creation of these ETFs could indicate a growing wariness within some sectors towards overly dominant figures in technology, suggesting that their unchecked power may not always be viewed favorably by all investors or stakeholders.

articles.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
articles.summary: Head of Product at Microsoft's Bing division Fidji Simo has stepped down to join OpenAI as their new chief product officer.
points: Fidji Simo steps down from Head of Product role at Microsoft
Joins the senior leadership team at OpenAI in a newly created Chief Product Officer (CPO) position
Microsoft'nergize its own search technology with additional insights and enhancements to Bing
articles.insight: Fidji Simo joining as CPO of OpenAI may indicate Microsoft is seeking strategic partnerships or competitive advantages within AI space, while also strengthening their product leadership internally.

articles.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
articles.description: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.
articles.summary: OpenAI has launched its new model GPT-5.6 which is designed to improve in various domains with an emphasis on enhancing cybersecurity.
points: Launch of OpenAI's latest family of models, focusing on multifacde improvements
Specific enhancements include significant strides in the realm of cybersecurity within AI technology
The introduction and capabilities of GPT-5.6 represent a leap forward for safe integration into diverse IT environments
articles.insight: GPT-5.6's focus on improving areas such as cybersecurity marks an important step in the evolution towards more secure AI applications within complex IT ecosystems.

articles.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
articles.description: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.
articles.summary: Lyzr utilized an AI agent to successfully close a substantial funding round of $1 endorsed by their own created tool.
points: AI startup Lyzr leveraged its product for raising funds, achieving over double the seed investment goal with its self-promoting AI initiative. Raising $102 million from a team of six in just one month shows confidence within and outside industries.

Lyzr's unique approach to fundraising indicates that enterprise customers are increasingly recognizing the value of AI solutions, possibly opening up new markets or opportunities for companies developing similar technologies. The investment is poised to fuel further innovation in adaptable and sophisticated conversational interfaces.

With a $10 million seed round led by Andreessen Horowitz and other notable backers like TPG Growth, Lyzr's funding demonstrates the growing interest of major investors in AI-driven startups. The company is set to expand its presence across various industries with this financial boost.
articles.insight: The news suggests a significant shift toward integrating advanced AI agents into business processes, potentially transforming enterprise interactions and customer service models within the IT industry. Lyzr's success could encourage more startups to develop innovative AI solutions tailored for commercial applications.

articles.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
articles.description: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
articles.summary: After operating for under a year, OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, an AI-powered browser developed by the organization. Despite this decision, OpenAI continues to grow its ambitions in developing agentic browsing features and has plans to expand beyond browsers.
points: OpenAI will end operations of their AI-driven web exploration tool Atlas soon after less than a year of development
Some aspects from the now defunct browser are being transitioned into an extension for Google Chrome
The company'selike ambitions in creating agentic browsing features remain undeterred as they plan to release additional tools such as 'Giraffe'
articles.insight: OpenAI continues with AI-driven browser projects, demonstrating their commitment and vision for the role of artificial intelligence within internet navigation.

articles.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
articles.description: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.
articles.summary: Elon Musk has expressed support for Anthropic and denied any intention to 'cut off' their partnership with Microsoft.
points: Despite concerns about the company cutting ties due to alleged misconduct, Elon Musk reassured that no cut-off will happen. This decision comes amid a significant potential $40 billion in lost revenues for Anthropic if they lose Microsoft as their main partner.

The situation arose when reports surfaced claiming Anthropic's co-founder, Greg Marshall, was involved with the creator of ChatGPT, OpenAI. These allegations led to fears that Musk might sever ties due to ethical considerations in collaboration and competition.
In response, Elon Musk tweeted he is not cutting Anthropic off from Microsoft for now.
articles.insight: The assurance by a major figure like Elon Musk can provide stability within the AI industry. His support implies that despite past controversies and intense competition among tech giants, collaboration remains crucial to progress in technologies such as ChatGPT.

articles.title: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
articles.description: The AI ROI debate has returned and the numbers are even bigger, as are, perhaps, the consequences.
articles.summary: Experts predict that artificial intelligence (AI) could help companies save between $2 trillion to over $3 trillion by optimizing various processes.
points: The AI ROI debate has reignited with predictions indicating potential savings of $2-$3.5 trillion for businesses through process optimization using artificial intelligence.
AI implementation can result in substantial cost reduction across industries, potentially amounting to billions annually.
Experts suggest that while the benefits are significant, practical application and integration challenges remain.
articles.insight: The article highlights a potential economic impact of AI on business operations but also cautions about hurdles in actualizing these savings due to implementation issues. It suggests an opportunity for companies willing to invest strategically into their IT infrastructure could stand to gain substantially.

articles.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
articles.description: Meta's new Muse Spark 1.1. will go up against similar products offered by Anthropic and OpenAI.
articles.summary: The Meta-backed startup Muse has launched its first AI code generator product, Muse Spark 1.*8 (currently at beta), in an attempt to compete with similar offerings like Anthropic's Phi and OpenAI Codex. The company plans extensive marketing efforts for the launch.
points: Meta-backed startup Muse introduces Muse Spark, its AI code generator product designed as a competitor in the crowded AI coding market.
Muse Spark 1.*8 is entering into competition with Anthropic's Phi and OpenAI Codex after being beta tested for over six months.
To promote Muse Spark post-launch, Muse plans to engage users via a dedicated social media team as well as an influencer program.
articles.insight: The emergence of Muse Star's AI coding product represents the ongoing battle among major players like Meta and Microsoft in developing tools that can aid software development. The success of this venture could indicate shifts towards more automated, user-friendly code generation approaches within enterprises.

articles.title: Charles Hudson shares the common mistakes he’s seen after investing in 500+ startups
articles.description: In this week’s episode of Build Mode, Isabelle Johannessen talks with Precursor Ventures' Charles Hudson about the headwinds facing early-stage founders today and the most common mistakes founders should avoid in order to get funded.
articles.summary: In Build Mode Episode #236 with Charles Hudson of Precursor Ventures, he shares insights into the challenges early-stage startups face and common mistakes founders make when seeking investments.
points: Charles Hudson identifies several key pitfalls in pitching to angel groups and VC firms.
The importance of having a clear, focused business plan is emphasized for attracting funding opportunities.
Hudson advises founders on common questions investors ask during the due diligence process.
articles.insight: Charles Hudson's experience highlights that understanding market needs and delivering a compelling business plan are crucial for early-stage startups to secure funding in today’s challenging environment.
